compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
`docs/concurrency.md:305` links `([story 23d2-e0f3](../session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md) Rec 2)` but no `session-logs/` directory exists in the repo (session logs live in the rebar tickets store, not the filesystem).

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: the reference resolves, or points at the story id without a broken file link.
- Actual: dead relative link to a nonexistent `../session-logs/...md` file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/concurrency.md:305` no longer contains a dead link — either drop the file link and reference the story id in prose, or point at a real target.
- [ ] `grep -n 'session-logs/2026-06-09' docs/concurrency.md` returns nothing.

## Notes
Discovered while building the f088 docs-index/dead-link CI gate. Out of f088's scope: that gate only validates links resolving INSIDE docs/, and this link escapes docs/ (`../session-logs/`). A whole-repo markdown-link checker would catch it; filed separately so f088 stays scoped.
compiled_state.title: docs/concurrency.md has a dead link to ../session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md
